outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Day 44 — Marathon US-Iran talks end without deal; Vance says 'bad news for Iran'
outlets.summary: CNN covers talks collapse after 21 hours. Nuclear commitment and Hormuz control as key sticking points. Vance departs Pakistan.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: No agreement between US and Iran after 21 hours of talks, Vance says
outlets.summary: NBC covers Vance departure, Iran's 'ball in America's court' response, and IRGC 'last warning' on Hormuz.

outlets.name: Townhall
outlets.headline: After 21 Hours of Negotiations, VP JD Vance Provides an Update. It's Not Shocking
outlets.summary: Townhall covers Vance's 'final and best offer.' Framing: Iran chose not to accept terms, talks failure expected.

outlets.name: Hot Air
outlets.headline: Vance: No deal, and that's bad news for Iran
outlets.summary: Hot Air covers talks collapse. Vance's nuclear weapons focus. Iran's refusal to commit long-term.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: JD Vance leaves Islamabad after talks with Iran end without a deal
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog: Vance departs after 21 hours. Iran says agreed on several points but two issues remain. Expert-level talks may continue.

outlets.name: Gulf News
outlets.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Collapse: VP Vance Says No Nuclear Deal After 21-Hour Negotiations
outlets.summary: Gulf News focuses on nuclear red line and Hormuz control as sticking points. Regional impact of failed talks.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: JD Vance: U.S.-Iran Talks Ended After 21 Hours, but No Deal
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers talks failure. Israel preparing extensive attack on Iranian energy infrastructure if diplomacy fails entirely.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: US-Iran talks fail to yield deal, end after 21 hours; US negotiators leave
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog: Talks collapse. Netanyahu trial resumes — court rejects delay twice. Hezbollah 105 attack waves on Israel.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran enters talks with US in Islamabad with 'complete distrust'
outlets.summary: PressTV frames talks as US looking for 'excuse to leave.' Iran entered with seriousness. Ball now in America's court.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Netanyahu requests delay in corruption trial testimony amid Iran ceasefire
outlets.summary: PressTV covers Netanyahu's corruption trial as evidence of political motivations behind the war. Court rejected delay.
